title: HetznerPrimaryIp
description: Manages a Hetzner Cloud Primary IP.

PrimaryIpAssigneeType.description: Type of resource the Primary IP can get assigned to. Currently Primary IPs can only be assigned to Servers, therefore this field must be set to `server`.

name.description: Name of the Resource. Must be unique per Project.

datacenter.description: **Deprecated**: This property is deprecated and will be removed after 1 July 2026.

location.description: Location ID or name the Primary IP will be bound to.

assigneeType.description: Type of resource the Primary IP can get assigned to.

assigneeId.description: ID of resource to assign the Primary IP to.
